response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, open-source contributions, and exposure to agentic workflows at re:cinq, but lacks clear evidence of leading multi-agent AI systems at scale in regulated fintech environments, managing teams beyond 10 people, or designing financial risk/credit systems — critical gaps for a CTO role in this domain.
strengths: Hands-on experience with agentic workflows and MCP frameworks at re:cinq
Proven ability to build and maintain event-driven, scalable systems (GISCollective, DLang microservices)
Strong engineering culture contributions via testing, CI/CD, and knowledge sharing
concerns: No demonstrated experience in fintech infrastructure, credit risk, or compliance systems
Lacks evidence of leading engineering teams from 10 to 30+ or developing senior technical leadership layers
No clear track record of architecting production multi-agent AI systems with real-time financial data feedback loops
